use tokio::time::{timeout, sleep, Duration};

async fn call_upstream() -> Result<String, &'static str> {
    Err("transient failure")
}

async fn process_with_retries() -> Result<String, &'static str> {
    // GOOD: single outer deadline bounds the entire retry loop
    let deadline = Duration::from_secs(5);
    let result = timeout(deadline, async {
        for attempt in 0..5 {
            match call_upstream().await {
                Ok(val) => return Ok(val),
                Err(_) => {
                    sleep(Duration::from_millis(100 * (attempt + 1))).await;
                }
            }
        }
        Err("exhausted retries")
    }).await;

    match result {
        Ok(inner) => inner,
        Err(_) => Err("deadline exceeded"),
    }
}
